MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DERRICK PARRISH'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is off calendar. The case has been dismissed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

Notice Fo Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions; P&A
Off Calendar Jun-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DERRICK PARRISH'S Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions is to be heard at 9:00am in Department 301 on the line 7 of the discovery calendar. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Joe Vickstein CSR # 4780

Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-25-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CHANA PARRISH.
WILLIAM E. SHAPIRO, ESQ., LAW OFFICES OF WILLIAM E. SHAPIRO, TEL. 415.678.9209, FOR DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY DERRICK LEON PARRISH.

PLAINTIFF IS deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by a Judge Pro Tem.

DEFENDANT DERRICK PARRISH'S Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions is granted. See written order.

Judge Pro Tem Mark Schrieber, not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Answer
Off Calendar May-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William E. Shapiro, Esq., Law Office, 415-678-9209, specially appearing for defendant and moving party

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANT DERRICK LEON PARRISH'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Answer is
Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; not reported.

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William E. Shapiro, Esq., of the Law Offices of William E. Shapiro, Tel. 415.678.9209, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Chana Parrish, Tel. 415.822.2264, Plaintiff, appearing on her own behalf.
Sean Starkey, Tel. 415.867.2313 (not a party to the case)

The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DERRICK PARRISH'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is Granted. Defendant has shown he is entitled to relief under Code of Civil Procedure section 473(b). In addition, the Court set a Trial Date of Oct. 15, 2012 in Department 206. The Discovery cut-of dates will be triggered by the new trial date. Parties waive notice. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2012 Continued To Apr-19-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT DERRICK PARRISH'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is Continued on court's own motion to be heard in Department 302 at 9:30 am on Thursday April 19, 2012. Parties are ordered to provide Department 302 with courtesy copies of all moving papers, with a cover sheet noting the continued hearing date, by 4:00 P.M. on Friday, April 13, 2012. Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Brenda Fields, CSR #7235.

Plaintiff Chana Parrish was present in pro per, placed under oath an examined.
Sean Starkey, consultant and witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Derrick Leon Parrish
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 24, 2011.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, October 11, 2011.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Chana Parrish, and against defendant Derrick Leon Parrish as follows:

Principal - $29,248.00.
Costs - $150.00.
Consultant Fee - $3,000.00

Total - $32,398.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2011 Set For Trial On Oct-11-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2011 Continued To Jul-08-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
